TestCase z7Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    double* follow_case_x = (double*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(double));
    memcpy(follow_case_x, t1.x, t1.n * sizeof(double));
    follow_case.x = follow_case_x;
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive code generated based on rule (a) to prevent errors when n <= 0
    if (follow_case.n <= 0) {
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Specific operation code generated based on the rule
    int idx = rand() % follow_case.n;
    if (follow_case.x[idx] > -999.9) {
        follow_case.x[idx] = -999.9;
    }
    
    return follow_case;
}
